config.js.description: Shared configuration — suppliers, events, Firebase, budget categories

hub.html.description: Unified shell — navigation, shared auth, module loader

venue-planner.html.description: Site layout canvas — drag/drop, Firestore save, quote summary

todo.html.description: Master to-do list — swimlane lifecycle, Firebase sync

kanban.html.description: Kanban + Gantt timeline + Build Week grid

task-tracker.html.description: Simple task tracker (legacy — superseded by todo.html)

notes:
v6-stable checkpoint — real world use session.
Fixed: venue picker bug (setup modal no longer appears before venue chosen).
Fixed: build week drag & drop chips between cells.
Fixed: build week colour coding (isDerig passed correctly).
Added: collapse all / expand all in To-Do.
Added: Artist Liaison section in To-Do, free-text category input.
Added: people sorted A-Z by first name in Staff.
Added: tab renamed Design & Print.
Pending features agreed this session:
- Smart bar planning tool (width/shape/stations/staff/revenue/lost revenue/RAG)
- Smart toilet planning tool (capacity/pump-out timing/RAG)
- Centre selected item on canvas (H/V/both)
- Point-to-point measurement tool
- Zone templates (bar, catering, stage)
- Ticket sales as single source of truth (target + actuals audit log drives all calculations)
- Staff roles sheet (roles first, people assigned with % split, utilisation & gap RAG)
- Design & Print workflow (brief → quote → approved → production → print)
- Designer shared workspace (brief sent, quote, timeline, draft review, approval)
- Nothing hardcoded — all values from config/Firestore
- Purple Guide commercial licence needed (Event Safety Alliance) before redistribution
